text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I see Marvelous Sunday talking with<n>Nice Nature
one day after classes are<n>finished.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait, isn't this you and Mayano? The<n>news is
talking all about how the two<n>of you managed to
make an extinct<n>flower bloom.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you mean that thing from a while<n>back? I did
get a lot of praise for that!<n>☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You can downplay it all you want, but<n>this is the
discovery of the century.<n>You should really be
proud.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
But all we did was help make<n>something
marvelous happen. ☆ You<n>see, it all started when
we were up<n>on a snowy mountain...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Here comes a Kaiser snowball! ☆<n>Take this! ★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oof! Now you've done it! But I'm still<n>airborne!
And this one's a<n>heat-seeker! ♪

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Aaagh! So cooold! ☆ All right, that's it!I'm going to make an evenbigger snowball!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! ☆ Mayday! Mayday! Ahaha! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: What's wrong? Are you giving up<n>already?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Mayano! Why don't we make<n>an igloo
here?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Yeah, let's do it! Let's make it<n>look like a
majestic castle!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: There, all done! What a marvelous<n>igloo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Let's go in and—
Graaah! Grrrrr!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what the?! A g-gorilla?! And it's<n>completely
white!

text_block_list.name: White Gorilla(?)
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What's it mad about?! We haven't<n>even done
anything!

text_block_list.name: White Gorilla(?)
text_block_list.text: Rrrgh! Grrr!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I see.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
It's been protecting this area by itself<n>all this
time.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
And waiting for its wish to come<n>true—its wish
that a marvelous day<n>will come.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! This igloo is nice and<n>warm, and it'll
wrap you in<n>marvelousness!

text_block_list.name: White Gorilla(?)
text_block_list.text: Graaah... Grrr...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, it ran off.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
And that's what happened! ☆ After<n>that, a
marvelous flower bloomed, so<n>we told everyone
about it! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, hold it! That can't be all! How<n>can you
expect me to believe that<n>story?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
A mysterious white gorilla? Igloo<n>power? Ha,
that's one tall tale...<n>Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, isn't it just wonderful? ☆ We<n>granted its
wish, and a miraculously<n>marvelous thing
happened! ♪

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You'll see once we get to the<n>marvelous flower.
Keep following me!<n>☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Follow you? Uh, when did I agree to<n>go
anywhere?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! ☆ Stay right there, you<n>marvelous thing,
you! ★☆★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Something marvelous, huh? I wonder<n>if my
performance will increase by a<n>miraculous
margin if I wish for it with<n>all my heart.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: But of course! ☆ First, you have tofeel the sheer marvelousness ofthe world! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Actually, that sounds darn near<n>scary... Y'know
what, forget I asked. I<n>think I'd rather stay as I
am.
